name: TechnipFMC plc
business: TechnipFMC is a leading technology provider to traditional and new energy industries, delivering fully integrated projects, products, and services. It operates through two segments: Subsea, which provides subsea production systems, SURF, and services; and Surface Technologies, which provides drilling, wellheads, stimulation equipment, and services for onshore and shallow water. Customers include major integrated oil companies, national oil companies, independent E&P companies, and oil and gas service companies.
sellsTo: Oil and natural gas service companies

exposures.sentence: We are a leading technology provider to the traditional and new energy industries, delivering fully integrated projects, products, and services.
TechnipFMC aspires to lead the offshore floating renewables industry by leveraging our differentiated technologies, product standardization, and system integration approach.
Our contributions to GHG removal begin with carbon transportation and storage (CTS).

Deep Purple is our primary sustainable energy solution that provides renewable and scalable energy production offshore by integrating hydrogen production, compression, storage, and re-electrification.
Our Schilling Robotics business is the leading designer and manufacturer of subsea ROVs, ROV tooling systems, and robotic manipulator arms.

iComplete utilizes our digital offering CyberFrac to improve safety by eliminating manpower in high-risk areas, boost efficiency through autonomous operations, and reduce unplanned stoppages by using predictive analytics.

Natural gas prices are forecast to remain relatively stable, with rising demand from AI-driven data centers likely to be met by growth in global supply, primarily from increased exports of liquefied natural gas (LNG) from the United States.
We continually attempt to develop new technologies for use in our business, including AI.

catalysts.event: Pledge to return at least 70% of free cash flow to shareholders in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Reiterated our commitment to robust shareholder distributions, pledging to return at least 70% of free cash flow to shareholders in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: iEPCI has grown to represent nearly one-third of the addressable subsea market
tamClaims.sentence: iEPCI has since grown to represent nearly one-third of the addressable subsea market, validating the benefits of our unique business model aimed at improving project economics by accelerating the delivery schedule of hydrocarbon production.
